## Checklist
- [ ] `make lint` and `make test` pass
- [ ] If data changed: `data/SOURCES.md` updated (source + license + producing script)
- [ ] **No proprietary-sourced data committed** (coordinates come from OSM/Nominatim — see DATA-LICENSE.md)
- [ ] If user-visible: added/updated a Playwright regression test in `tests/e2e/`
- [ ] Runtime stays dependency-free (no framework / required build step to view the map)
